Publish Site
Generate & download your updated site instantly

🚀 Ready to publish your changes?

All products saved. Click to build and download your complete updated website — no upload needed.

Building your site...
Starting...

How to go live

1
Make all your changes here — add, edit, or remove products from any page.
2
Click "Download Updated Site" — your complete pahadiroots.html is built instantly with all products.
3
Replace your old pahadiroots.html on your hosting. Live immediately! ✅
